$comment: Safety net (architecture §6 / CLAUDE.md). Records the tracked version of every L1 base component. CI re-adds each to a temp dir and diffs against packages/ui/src/components/ui — divergence FAILS the build. A failure means 'this edit is in the wrong layer', not 'silence the guard'.

button.note: Pristine shadcn output. Regenerate with: npx shadcn@latest add button --overwrite
